title: Titration of AmPure XP Beads for Removal of Fragments <400bp
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"d5onp","text":"Note: AmPure XP beads are normally used at 80:100 ratio* (beads:DNA) to remove fragments less than 100bp and retain all DNA above 100bp. If you lower that ratio. then DNA will not bind to the beads as efficiently (due to decreased amount of PEG present) and you will lose some of the DNA. To recover all DNA, make sure the starting DNA is not too concentrated and hold onto the residual sample after beads first adhere to magnet; in this way you can re-bind any unbound DNA to fresh beads. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b62bi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fs806","text":"*see step 17 annotation for more info","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1i2hq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"200j7","text":"Agencourt® AmPure® XP beads:  Beckman Coulter #A63880","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2r1s5","text":"100bp DNA ladder:  New England Biolabs (NEB) #N3231S (comes with 6xGLB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qbk8","text":"6x Blue Orange Loading Dye:  Promega #G190A (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8khe1","text":"Magnetic Particle Concentrator (MPC):  Invitrogen Dyna-Mag2 #123-21D","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
